The function should check if all the notes in the given list fall within the specified vocal range. It will need to convert the note strings into numerical values to determine if they are within the lower and upper bounds. The function will compare the numerical values of each note to the lower and upper bounds and return `True` if all notes are within the range, otherwise `False`.
